# SourDiesel color inventory

<!-- Generated by themes/sourdiesel/tool.py from palette.toml. Do not edit directly. -->

`palette.toml` is the source of truth for shared colors. Application-native files remain
hand-authored and are checked against this inventory by `./bootstrap.sh --check`.

## Palette

| Kind | Slot | Name | Hex | Intended role |
| --- | ---: | --- | --- | --- |
| ANSI | 0 | `black` | `#cccccc` | soft neutral and structural text |
| ANSI | 1 | `red` | `#ffc7c7` | errors, removals, and invalid state |
| ANSI | 2 | `green` | `#ceffc9` | success, additions, strings, and commands |
| ANSI | 3 | `yellow` | `#fdf7cd` | warnings, escapes, and secondary emphasis |
| ANSI | 4 | `blue` | `#c4effa` | paths, directories, functions, and guidance |
| ANSI | 5 | `magenta` | `#eccef0` | keywords, configuration, and primary accent |
| ANSI | 6 | `cyan` | `#8ae7c5` | data, sockets, punctuation, and supporting accent |
| ANSI | 7 | `white` | `#f4f3f2` | primary foreground |
| ANSI | 8 | `brightblack` | `#5c617d` | muted text, comments, and inactive state |
| ANSI | 9 | `brightred` | `#f096b7` | strong error and destructive emphasis |
| ANSI | 10 | `brightgreen` | `#d2fd9d` | strong success and executable emphasis |
| ANSI | 11 | `brightyellow` | `#f3b175` | strong warning and document emphasis |
| ANSI | 12 | `brightblue` | `#80d7fe` | strong path, syntax, and informational emphasis |
| ANSI | 13 | `brightmagenta` | `#c9ccfb` | secondary accent and selected state |
| ANSI | 14 | `brightcyan` | `#47e7b1` | completion, note, and active supporting state |
| ANSI | 15 | `brightwhite` | `#ffffff` | maximum-contrast foreground |
| Extra | — | `dark` | `#1b1c28` | dark application background |
| Extra | — | `grey` | `#313244` | selection and elevated surface |
| Extra | — | `terminal_surface` | `#212030` | terminal and desktop chrome surface |

## Non-color tokens

| Name | Value |
| --- | --- |
| `nvim_background` | `NONE` |

## Legacy outliers

| Consumer | Allowed colors | Reason |
| --- | --- | --- |

## Manual consumers

- Terminal.app (`terminals/terminal/sourdiesel.terminal`): ANSI profile uses archived NSColor values; inspect after palette changes.
